song.title: The Cleansing Stream
song.author: Mrs. Phoebe Palmer
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .D G O now I see the cleansing wave, . D A The fountain deep and wide. . D G Jesus, my Lord, mighty to save, . D A7 D Points to His wounded side. [C] . G D The cleansing stream I see, I see. . A7 D I plunge, and O it cleanseth me! . G D O praise the Lord it cleanseth me! . A7 D It cleanseth me, yes, cleanseth me. [V2] I see the dear Redeemer raised; I hear the speaking blood. It speaks! My spirit is amazed, And quickened by its flood. [V3] I rise to walk in God’s own light, Above the world and sin, With heart renewed and garments white, And Christ enthroned within.
